The '''''Ulzepdi''''' was a [[Modular conveyor]] belonging to the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]].

The ''Ulzepdi'' was attempting to escape the attack on an Imperial cargo transfer site in the [[Yrrna system/Legends|Yrrna system]] made by [[TIE/d "Defender" Multi-Role Starfighter/Legends|TIE Defenders]] duplicated by [[Nami]] [[Pirate/Legends|pirates]]. [[Maarek Stele/Legends|Maarek Stele]], in a [[TIE/ad starfighter|TIE Avenger]], escorted the ''Ulzepdi'' to safety.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: TIE Fighter: Defender of the Empire]]''
